{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Waybound
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Waybound]] are individuals noticed by [[Kiuran]] and the [[Hounds]] who are Fated to bind themselves to the [[Way Between Worlds]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31">''Waybound'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The report is located after the events of [[Waybound]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
